Structure-first document indexing without a vector database.

Vectorless RAG

Background

Embeddings & vector stores add cost to retrieval.

Prior Work

PageIndex reconstructs a document’s structure with hundreds of LLM calls, reading none of the structure the file already contains.

Approach

We read the embedded outline first, then typography, then an LLM only for what is genuinely ambiguous.

Conclusion

Documents already carry their structure; reading it is exact and free.
